text.title: Golden-Master Corpus for AI-Driven Legacy Rewrites Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the test-golden-master-legacy-rewrite methodology end-to-end. Decision-gates surface stops when inputs do not pass.

step.name: sample-inputs
step.action: Apply top-N + tail + fuzz sampling; aim for ≥ 1000 pairs for medium modules.

step.name: capture-outputs
step.action: Run legacy implementation against each input; canonicalize non-determinism; store as expected_output.

step.name: hook-up-runner
step.action: Wire `templates/golden_master_test.py` to run on every PR.
step.output: CI fails on any unapproved diff.

step.name: agent-rewrites
step.action: Coding agent rewrites the module; runs corpus locally; iterates until all pairs match.
step.decision-gate: If 100% match impossible due to intentional fix, branch into approve-diff flow.

step.name: approve-diffs-row-by-row
step.action: For each intentional diff, add an entry to `approved_diffs.yaml` with rationale; CI re-runs.
step.output: All pairs either match or are row-approved.
